creates.label: personal data must be pro...
creates.fact: personal data must be processed lawfully, fairly and in a transparent manner in relation to the data subject
comments:
1. Should this duty be expressed as a complex duty (lawful, fair and transparant)?
2. Can complex duties be decomposed into simple duties?
3. Or should we interpret this sentence as three separate simple duties: process lawful, process fair and process transparant?
